creator: jsa.bsd@gmail.com
text:
Hi. This is a courtesy followup so people know I am not ignoring this. I
am aware of the issue, and will have a fix ready within a day; after
sleep, classes, and my ports catch up.

In the interim, you can manually add x11/xcb-util-keysyms to the system
and it should build fine.

@Oleg
Right idea, wrong place. It hypothetically needs to be under the
WITHOUT_XCB option, under the else clause.
